chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-203 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 05-04-2019 Mr. Abdul Ghaffar Memon, State counsel.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. Same was the position on the last two dates of hearing. It appears that after filing of this application, the applicant has lost his interest; therefore, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
